title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Transfer Build
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
